title: Missy's Adventure Time weapon pack
description: A resource pack to add some Adventure Time weapons with CIT, so far includes Finn's Demon Blood sword and MARCELINE'S AX BASS!!!!
body:
# Missy's Adventure Time weapon pack!
Some weapons from Adventure Time!!

So far there's Marceline's Ax Bass (netherite axe) and Finn's Demon Blood Sword (netherite sword)

This is a **CIT** pack so you have to rename the weapons with an anvil for it to show up

For **Netherite Axe** and **Netherite Sword**

**rename** them to "**Ax Bass**"(netherite axe) and "**Demon Blood**"(netherite sword)


Check gallery for more pictures!

If you want me to make a specific weapon or anything you can message me on discord mise_png and ill consider it <3

ALSO check out my painting mod!
[missy's paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/missy-paintings) for 1.21.x

[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/63uLWQvU/ecacb39d88c5b2706e02f3520a7ae8db8375cacf.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/missy-paintings)

## Warning
A CIT mod (such as [Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)) is REQUIRED for **1.21.1** and **BELOW** for this pack to actually do anything.

## Current weapons
**Ax Bass**
![A cute pose with emotecraft](https://ad-andromeda.neocities.org/assets/modrinth_stuff/ax-bass-swag.png)
**Demon Blood**
![Finn posing with the Demon Blood sword](https://ad-andromeda.neocities.org/assets/modrinth_stuff/demon-blood-pose.png)
The Demon Blood sword has some extra versions for decorations, theres a chained version and a chained version with a lock, heres how the locked one looks
![Locked Demon Blood](https://ad-andromeda.neocities.org/assets/modrinth_stuff/locked-demon-blood.png)
[360 Iron chained Demon Blood](https://ad-andromeda.neocities.org/assets/modrinth_stuff/locked-version.webp)
Theres also copper versions, here are the normal chained ones (without the lock)
[360 Copper Chained versions](https://ad-andromeda.neocities.org/assets/modrinth_stuff/copper-versions.webp)


## CIT stuff

format is
"cit name" = weapon/model
so a netherite axe called "Ax Bass" will be the Ax Bass or a netherite axe named "Ax Bass R" will be a reversed grip Ax Bass

**Ax Bass**:
 - "Ax Bass" = Ax Bass (on newer minecraft version "Axe Bass" also works)
 - "Ax Bass F" = Makes the Ax Bass face the other way in third person
 - "Ax Bass R" = Reverse grip Ax Bass
 - "Ax Bass P" = Propped Ax Bass, meaning it leans against a block so it can be used as decoration in item frames
 - "Ax Bass WP" = Wall Propped Ax Bass, meaning it leans against a wall (two blocks)


**Demon Blood**:
 - "Demon Blood" = Normal Demon Blood sword
- "Grape Blood" = The Grape sword (a more purple-pink-ish Demon Blood sword)
- "Demon Blood C" = Chained Demon Blood sword for decoration
- Also Copper Versions:
  - "Demon Blood CC" = Copper Chained Demon Blood
  - "Demon Blood ECC" = Exposed Copper Chained Demon Blood
  - "Demon Blood WCC" = Weathered Copper Chained Demon Blood
  - "Demon Blood OCC" = Oxidized Copper Chained Demon Blood
- "Demon Blood L" = Locked Demon Blood sword, like the chained one but with a lock on it
- Also Copper Versions:
  - "Demon Blood CL" = Copper Locked Demon Blood
  - "Demon Blood ECL" = Exposed Copper Locked Demon Blood
  - "Demon Blood WCL" = Weathered Copper Locked Demon Blood
  - "Demon Blood OCL" = Oxidized Copper Locked Demon Blood

## Credits
Weapon models and textures made by me, mise_png!

Texture pack in the screenshots (other than mine): [Adventure Time Texture Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/adventure-time-texture-pack) by SquirrelGames

Map used in the screenshots: [Adventure Time Mashup Pack Java Edition](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/adventure-time-mashup-pack-java-edition) by Usaki

Emotes with [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft) by KosmX
